title: Red Powder Snow
description: A small resource pack that makes powder snow red.
body:
This resource pack simply sets the powder snow block texture to a solid red color, making it easier to avoid.

You can install this pack if you keep on entering powder snow by accident or want to find traps more easily.

Note that this pack only modifies the block texture, so the hearts or vignette will still stay blue.

Also note that a workaround is used to ensure the pack won't have warning messages or errors displayed in-game for the forseeable future. This workaround shouldn't have an impact on anything however.
